title: heterotheca scaberrima
intro: Heterotheca scaberrima, also known as the rough-leaved heterotheca, is a perennial plant native to North America, belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Heterotheca scaberrima include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Heterotheca scaberrima is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in topical applications to soothe skin irritations and wounds.
